$comment: VENDORED COPY for the WS-A contract test in claude-copilot/tools/cc. Source of truth is copilot-control-tower/docs/01-architecture/schemas/_envelope.schema.json — update this copy from there, not the reverse.
title: Copilot CLI --json shared envelope & definitions
description: Shared building blocks for every copilot/cc --json verb consumed by Control Tower. cli-contract.md mandates a top-level schema_version on every verb; other than that field there is no uniform status/error wrapper across verbs, so this file factors out $defs that the per-verb schemas $ref rather than imposing a wrapper the prose does not define.

schema_version.description: Versioned contract identifier carried by every verb. Control Tower range-gates this in both directions.
schema_version.$comment: cli-contract.md requires a top-level schema_version everywhere but does not fix its lexical form. Encoded as a comparable MAJOR.MINOR[.PATCH] string; owner may prefer a bare integer if range-gating is integer-based.

git_sha.description: A git object SHA (abbreviated or full, lowercase hex).

severity.description: Checker verdict. A missing severity is treated as fail by the consumer (fail-closed); the CLI must always emit it.
